page_title: Eva and Good Friends Undressing Complementary Plan
text:
Is a video game that was made and published by GAINAX on 23 July 1999, for Microsoft Windows 95 and 98. It is a ported version of Neon Genesis Evangelion: Eva and Good Friends for Sega Saturn and PlayStation, this work includes elements of nudity, making it an adult game. https://web.archive.org/web/20001007183108/http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/datsui/index.html 

Shunji Suzuki, Kazuhiro Takamura, Hiroyuki Utatane, and Hizuru Imai are in charge of drawing for the "Undressing Complementary Plan" mode. In addition, the character of "Nadia of the Fushigi no Umi" does not appear in the "Supplemental Undressing Plan" mode.

Overview

System Requirements
OS: Any system capable of running Windows 95 or Windows 98 :RAM: 32MB minimum
Resolution: minimum 640x480 Color Depth: HighColor (16-bit) minimum
Quad-speed or faster CD-ROM drive
System capable of supporting DirectX 5.0 or later

CD-ROMs

"Undressing complement plan / Shinji and Good friends select CD-ROM" (Gainax) - Released on 09 September 2000.
"Undressing complement plan/Shinji and Good friends select CD-ROM 2" (Gainax) - Released on 08 August 2001.
